name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from magic missile.
effect: +5 AC including against triggering attack; blocks magic missile damage; until start of next turn
notes: Cast as reaction when hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile
+5 AC retroactively applies to the triggering hit — can turn a hit into a miss
Staff-equipped casters get mana-crystals free each cast
